title: Lowe's Announces Partnership with Carhartt to Outfit Hardworking Pros
text: Home improvement retailer rolls out premium workwear collection online and at stores across U.S. MOORESVILLE, N.C. , Oct. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lowe's and Carhartt, the uniform of hard work since 1889, today announced a partnership that will bring an assortment of Carhartt products to Lowes.com and select stores nationwide.
